## Description
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Open the app
2. Write this script: ...
3. Click Run
4. See error

## Expected Behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour
What actually happened. Include any error messages from the Output Panel.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g., Ubuntu 22.04 / Windows 11 / macOS 14]
- App Version: [shown in TopBar, e.g., v1.0.0]
- AI Provider (if relevant): [Gemini / OpenAI / Claude]
